review_title: The database manager with the most convenient options to work with
description: Using the community version you have the application that has connection with most of the database engines on the market. The usual work with the data (filtering, editing, exporting, etc) is the most comfortable of those I have tested.
author: Paco V.
pros: You can work with multiple database engines at the same time in a single application. It has very convenient data visualization and processing options.
cons: The community version does not have all database engines available and the enterprise option has a very expensive annual subscription model.

review_title: DBeaver - Best DB client for executing SQL queries
description: I really like DBeaver a lot since it feel its a very trustable product . Even if you are using community edition of the product you will still get regular product updates to improve its features and security.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The data migration and replication can be easily achieved using DBeaver . It provides lots of inbuilt database connector to connect with various databases . The inbuilt database functions are popped up while you are typing the function name , which makes the developer to write SQL's at a faster phase.
cons: The live compilation of the SQL will really great when you are trying to frame a complex query with various database function within it .

description: Good overall. Use for both local and cloud database access and worked well in both case. Use at work and for personal project and have no complaint
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy and free to use. Easy to set up, just simple download would work. Good Ui/UX design. Support for many database .
cons: DBeaver does not have support for team collaboration I think, or if it is, it's not its strong point.

description: As a database developer is really complete, open-source, and relatively easy to use, has its issues, but if you wait for your OS (Especially MacOS) to be officially supported is a great tool for the job, really complete.
author: Hector A.
pros: Is really complete, support several database engines, from Oracle to MariaDB, Supports Packages On MariaDB using Oracle Syntax (The only one I used supporting this), It can generate ER Diagrams of the tables on a database, easy to add new connections since it downloads the drivers by itself.
cons: Kinda buggy especially when a new OS is released, had a lot of problems when BigSur came out, they released fixes every couple of weeks, and now is fully compatible with big sur, I wish it had an option to export the ERD diagrams as UMLs to be used with Visual Paradigm and other diagramming software.

description: Very good experience, got all my work done fast and efficiently, not that much complaints i really enjoyed using the app
author: Joel K.
pros: It was easy to use Very cheap I used the free version and I was still able to get most of the work done. Solid interface
cons: The fact that it didn’t really have a login system, basically anyone who has my device is able to check my codes etc without needing to login etc, that can sometimes become a security issue
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best in Managing Database and sessions
description: Overall I found Dbeaver a great utility to start with and it can handle professional operations as well. It has great search features to lookup the server and database without slowing down the operation or task management.
author: Muhammad Daud S.
pros: I have found Dbeaver very user-friendly. Process controlling, running queries, and managing the database are very easy with this tool. Dbeaver allows the use of export to create the dump which is quicker than other applications. It has also a great session Manager to manage any stuck operations and tasks currently in process.
cons: Dbeaver has too frequent updates which sometimes causes problems with the existing version and it has to be upgraded/updated along with the additional files that take up more disk space and resources.

description: Overall it is a great experience and I love seeing other people use it as well. Its hard to get use to at first, but once you use it its hard to go back.
author: Keith T.
pros: Ability to use it for multiple different environments and multiple different DBs and languages, seemless switching between them
cons: A bit hard to setup initially and get use to, it was a slight divestiture for other applications and a far way from what I was use to at the time in MS SQL Server Management Studio, but it was quick to get use to

author: Andy B.
pros: Great database tool that lets you connect and manage PostgreSQL databases and many others (MySql, Oracle, SqlServer etc. ). I've tested a lot of PostgreSQL tools and this is the most reliable and most fully featured one I've tried. Supports transactions, parameters for queries, exports, imports and more.
cons: Some updates have been buggy, but they fix it quickly. I usually wait 10 days now before installing an update.

review_title: Dbeaver: The perfect platform for all you DB needs
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Its a userfriendly platform where you can write and execute queries. Allows for table visualizations and ER diagrams. Its free and opensource and we can addin plugins as well
cons: Export import could be made easier, laggy at times when the query is big. There are still a lot of unexplored settings which I feel can be overwhelming for a net new user.

description: I was introduced to it be a fellow hobbyist and developer and haven't looked back. I use it with postgrsql and connect to local and hosted databases .
author: Stuart P.
pros: Free tier is excellent. I've used it for many projects at work and at home. Easy to navigate. Well documented.
cons: Occasionally I get a feature that is paid but that is just me being cheap. Savings scripts Vs saving files can be a bit ambiguous.

description: Esperienza ottima, ne faccio un uso quotidiano da 7 anni, consigliatissimo!
author: Pierluigi M.
pros: La facilità d'uso, la velocità di configurazione, l'alta compatibilità con tutti i tipi di DB
cons: Non ho notato particolari inconvenienti nell'utilizzo

review_title: A powerful and versatile database management tool
description: Overall, DBeaver has been a reliable and powerful tool for managing multiple databases in one place.
author: Swathi J.
pros: The ease of usage is what I like most about DBeaver. It’s especially great for developers and data analysts who need a multi-platform tool.
cons: The UI is a bit complex for new users and might take some time to get used to.

description: It's affordable database software offering high-quality features that can get any database job done more efficiently. The interface is amazing, and getting started is not a drag. I would recommend this to anyone in my industry. It's cost-effective, and it's an industry-level standard.
author: Bongani N.
pros: There are a lot of things to like about DBeaver. What I like most about the software is: i) It's one of the most affordable database software in the market but performs as an industry standard. ii) I can connect to most of the databases in development. iii) Easy data exporting in different formats, including XML.iv) Seamless connection with NoSQL and SQL database. v) The software has regular updatesvi) User-friendly interfacevii) integration with different databases
cons: i) I don't like the multiple tabs when retrieving a table. Which can waste time. Otherwise, it's an awesome software to use.

review_title: DBeaver is a great universal database manager
description: When you need to quickly look in a database / table,especially when it is not the RDBMS that you are using most of the time, DBeaver is great. It's eclipse based so familiar to java developers. The easy of making a connection (wizard / guided) allows everyone to work with it.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: DBeaver is really a great tool to work with. I am using the community version and the way it allows for making connections to databases is great. Whenever you want to make a connection it for instance, will download driver when needed. The support for RDBMS is great and even H2 (a flat file dbms) is supported which is great. It allows for server connections to H2 as well as regular. A lot of RDBMS are supported. Even LDAP can be connected to. The ERD functionality is helpful in showing relationship between databases.
cons: Not that much not to like. The only database i did not see (and that i know) is IMS DB (from the 1960) but in theory that should also be possible since there is a JDBC for that database. Working with the data en executing queries and commands take a little effort but that is about it.

description: My overall experience with DBeaver has been pretty good. Very satisfied with the product and its features.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The product has support to connect to almost all kinds of DBs. Connectors are available for all. You can easily package your queries, import/export scripts, execute/write scripts, navigate db schemas, views, functions, tables. DBeaver is a complete package for DB access and management.
cons: Only one thing to improve is if the db connection is invalidated and you run a query, it takes a lot of time to validate the connection and run the query. It gets stuck sometimes.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The database management tool is one of its kind, with its community version it supports almost 99% of SQL and NoSQL databases, the ease of use and maintenance is remarkable.Very user friendly.
cons: Can start supporting those remaining 1% of databases

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easily connect to postgresql servers and query is faster. It has good number of options to connect and edit the query,
cons: There is alot of options in the settings but they are too complex to understand, hence it's not much useful as they are hidden in the plain sight for the new users

review_title: Great Free App For Managing Databases
description: Overall, I have found DBeaver to be a valuable part of my daily work flow. It is updated regularly and bugs are fixed quickly. I would recommend DBeaver to anyone looking for a simple, easy to use DB editor.
author: Ben H.
pros: I love the ease of use of DBeaver. I use it on a daily basis to manage several MariaDB databases. It works great on Kubuntu and has become my goto tool for database management. It remembers tabs for my next session, has an easy SQL editor with autocompletion and is straight forward to run through a proxy.
cons: On occasion, I have had problems creating both MySql events and procedures using Dbeaver. In both cases I have had to resort to the MySql command prompt and then confirm through DBeaver. A minor annoyance as these are unusual use cases for me.

description: It helped me for all of my daily activities and working with all RDBMS on a single GUI/Platform.The experience so far is quite helpful in every way.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The feature to add any kind of RDBMS and get the best features available out there . For Free.! The ER diagram is the best representation and the easy to see all the objects.
cons: Did not came across any cons since its free to use.!

author: Daniel M.
pros: This client works with the main relational databases. Great feature for drawing entity diagrams.
cons: You'll need the PRO version for working with NoSQL databases.

description: The tool is really great and taking in mind that it is also free I am surprised that there are still competitors on the market
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Performance and user interface are just great, very easy to use even for non technical people. The best about the tool is that it is free
cons: After being inactive for a long time you need to establish connection with the database again which can be a bit annoying sometimes
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good to use as a beginner
author: Sahil P.
pros: A free open source software for coding. Seems to be a good one for a beginner to start from
cons: Some limitations are there in terms of syntax.

description: I am creating many reports using PowerBI accessing many different types of databases. DBeaver allows me to quickly run SQL commands that are used in PowerBI for data verification. It has saved me much time!!!
author: Andrew T.
pros: Easily connects to databases and allows for the quick running of SQL commands on the database. The interface is simple to use. Allows for the saving on SQL commands. Little overhead so the SQL runs very quickly.
cons: When there is an error with the SQL, the error messages are somewhat cryptic which makes debugging of the SQL cumbersome.

review_title: Your go to open source DBMS
description: It is a great tool to manage your database for your day to day development although in these era of neat looking UI, this tools feels kinda outdated
author: Adityo G.
pros: It is filled with all your database management needs, from doing simple query to connecting to multiple database from different type of source. It also supports different UI theme, so if you're into that, it's there. It is easily manageable.
cons: Personally, i don't like the UI. It feels really cluttered sometimes.

author: Jelle D.
pros: DBeaver is a easy to use Database Management System. The community version already provides for a lot of functionalities. One of the features I really like is that it remembers the tabs you left open. On your next day of work you can get right back to the queries you were writing.
cons: The UI is a little bit outdated and could use an update.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
